Flow.description: The flow calculate 'Invoice Name' and 'Invoice Number' with same logic as we have in packaged WFs: 'InvoiceCreatedUpdated' and 'Invoice Set Invoice Name' if field 'Custom Invoice Number' (Custom_Invoice_Number__c) is blank, else set custom 'Invoice Name' and 'Invoice Number' from field 'Custom Invoice Number' (Custom_Invoice_Number__c).

formulas.description: If Field leaseworks__Revised_Invoice_Number__c is blank - Use Invoice Number LW (by formula from WF), else Custom Invoice Number
formulas.name: Final_Invoice_Name

formulas.description: If Field leaseworks__Revised_Invoice_Number__c is blank - Use _InvoiceNumber LW (by formula from WF), else Revised Invoice Number
formulas.name: Final_InvoiceNumber

formulas.description: Get the Invoice Name with formula from WF: 'Invoice Set Name'
formulas.name: Invoice_Name_WF
formulas.expression: if(Contains(TEXT({!$Record.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c}),'HL/SL-'), {!$Record.leaseworks__Lessor_Level__c} & '-','')& TEXT(YEAR( {!$Record.leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c} )) & '-' & Case(TEXT({!$Record.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c}), 'Aircraft MR','U' , 'Rent', 'R', 'Loan', 'L', 'Security Deposit', 'S', 'Interest','I', 'HL/SL-Rent','R', 'HL/SL-MR','U', 'HL/SL-SD','S', 'Service Fee','SF-', 'HL/SL-Interest','I', 'M' ) & IF(NOT(TEXT({!$Record.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c}) = 'Service Fee'), 'I' & '-' ,'') & Case({!$Record.leaseworks__Monthly_Utilization_Type_F__c}, 'True Up Gross','TU' , 'Assumed/Estimated', 'AE', 'Manual Credits/Adjustments', 'MC', 'Provision','PR', '' ) & IF( !ISBLANK({!$Record.leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Sequence_Number__c}), ('-'&RIGHT('00000' & TEXT( {!$Record.leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Sequence_Number__c} ),6)), '') & if({!$Record.leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Record_Type__c} == 'MR_Reconciliation' , '(Reconciliation)' , '')

formulas.description: get the '_Invoice Number' with formula from WF: 'Invoice Set Invoice Number'
formulas.name: InvoiceNumber_WF
formulas.expression:
IF(CONTAINS(TEXT({!$Record.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c}) , 'HL/SL') , {!$Record.Name} ,TEXT(YEAR( {!$Record.leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c} )) & '-' &
Case(TEXT({!$Record.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c}),
'Aircraft MR','U' ,
'Rent', 'R', 'Loan' , 'L',
'Security Deposit', 'S',
'Interest','I', 'Service Fee', 'SF-',
'M'
) & IF(NOT(TEXT({!$Record.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c}) = 'Service Fee'), 'I' & '-' ,'') &
Case({!$Record.leaseworks__Monthly_Utilization_Type_F__c},
'True Up Gross','TU' ,
'Assumed/Estimated', 'AE',
'Manual Credits/Adjustments', 'MC',
'Provision','PR',
''
)
&
IF( !ISBLANK({!$Record.leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Sequence_Number__c}),
('-'&RIGHT('00000' & TEXT( {!$Record.leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Sequence_Number__c} ),6)), ''))

Flow.interviewLabel: Update Invoice Name and Number Local {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Update Invoice Name and Number Local v2
